_note: Cute-pixel reskin prototype — CHAPTER 1 'body' (immune-system origin). Keeps the game's charming tone. STYLE is prepended to every asset prompt; NEGATIVE steers away from the dark-scrap look. Sprites are 512x512 transparent (InSPyReNet); the background is 1280x720 opaque. Colors mirror the current procedural art so sprites stay recognizable (player teal #7de3c3, etc). Edit freely, then: python scripts/reskin/gen.py
style: cute chibi pixel art, soft rounded shapes, bright cheerful pastel palette, thick clean dark outline, simple flat cel shading, kawaii friendly expression, 32-bit era game sprite, centered composition, full body visible, single isolated character, plain solid white background
negative: dark, gritty, grim, scary, horror, realistic, photorealistic, 3d render, gradient background, ground shadow, environment, floor, text, watermark, signature, blurry, jpeg artifacts

player.prompt: a cute round teal jelly blob mascot, big sparkling friendly eyes, rosy blushing cheeks, small happy smile, soft mint-green body

redcell.prompt: a cute smiling red blood cell, soft rounded red biconcave disc with a gentle central dimple, rosy and friendly

wbc.prompt: a cute white blood cell, round fluffy pale-white cell with tiny soft bumps around the rim, big gentle eyes, chubby and slow

antibody.prompt: a cute Y-shaped antibody protein character, pastel blue, three little rounded arms, tiny happy face, quick and nimble

amoeba.prompt: a cute translucent green amoeba blob with little rounded pseudopod arms reaching out, big curious eyes, wobbly and squishy

bg_body.prompt: the inside of a friendly body, soft pink fleshy cavern walls, gentle warm cozy glow, tiny floating cells in the distance, cute pixel art game background
